_TEMPLATE._comment: Copy this block, rename the key, fill in real coordinates via CoordPicker
_TEMPLATE.name: My Form Name

fields._comment: DATA — from Excel (Master or batch sheet). Changes every client/transaction.
fields.name: client_name

fields._comment: SETTINGS — from settings.json. Set once, reused on every form.
fields.name: rm_name

fields._comment: FIXED — hardcoded here. Never changes (currency, bank name, etc.).
fields.name: currency

fields._comment: AUTO — app generates at runtime. auto_type: date | year | month
fields.name: date

_FIELD_REFERENCE._comment: All field options — copy only what you need

fields.name: field_name
fields.settings_key: (settings only, optional) key in settings.json if different from name
fields.data_key: (data only, optional) Excel column name if different from name
